LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigarettes.description: Roll coyote tobacco chew into cigarettes.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigars.description: Roll coyote tobacco chew into cigars with a bit of gold trim for a more refined smoke.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.description: Make a fine atomic cocktail, mixed precisely from multiple ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.label: make fine atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.description: Make a gourmet atomic cocktail where every factor has been calculated for maximum flavor and body.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.label: make gourmet atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.description: Make a lavish atomic cocktail mixed from a wide variety of ingredients and chilled to perfection before serving.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.label: make lavish atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.description: Make a simple atomic cocktail quickly mixed from a duo of ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.label: make simple atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.description: Make guarana by fortifying homebrew sarsaparilla with caffeine and a radioactive kick. It delivers fast energy and a later crash.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.label: make guarana
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.description: Make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup by reducing fruit juice and sweetener into a thick bottling concentrate.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.label: make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.description: Make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup by mixing natural fruit juice with sugar or preserved syrup. This recipe is much more efficient.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.label: make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup (efficient)
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: Create brahmin shroom butter from milk and smokeleaf. Rich, fatty, and wildly irresponsible, it is the sort of condiment only a place like the Lucky 38 would serve on purpose.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: make brahmin shroom butter
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.label: make xander root paste
LanguageData.RobCo_Assaultron_Recipe.label: craft Assaultron
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronDominator_Recipe.label: craft Assaultron Dominator
LanguageData.RobCo_Cyberdog_Recipe.label: craft cyberdog
LanguageData.RobCo_Eyebot_Recipe.label: craft Eyebot
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotDuraframe_Recipe.label: craft Eyebot duraframe
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNanny_Recipe.label: craft Miss Nanny
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterFarmhand_Recipe.label: craft Mister Farmhand
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy_Recipe.description: Craft a RobCo Mister Gutsy Gunner.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy_Recipe.label: craft Mister Gutsy gunner
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandy_Recipe.label: craft Mister Handy
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator_Recipe.label: craft liberator
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime_Recipe.label: restore Liberty Prime
LanguageData.RobCo_Collectron_Recipe.label: craft collectron
LanguageData.RobCo_Constructron_Recipe.label: craft constructron
LanguageData.RobCo_Factotron_Recipe.label: craft factotron
LanguageData.RobCo_Protectron_Recipe.label: craft Protectron
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron_Recipe.label: craft utilitron
LanguageData.RobCo_Robobrain_Recipe.label: craft robobrain
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkI_Recipe.label: craft Securitron mark I
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII_Recipe.description: Craft an improved Securitron Mark II.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII_Recipe.label: craft Securitron mark II
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotAnnihilator_Recipe.label: craft an annihilator sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotPestcontrol_Recipe.label: craft a pestcontrol sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotSiegebreaker_Recipe.label: craft a siegebreaker sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachine_Recipe.label: restore war machine
LanguageData.WestTek_MakeFloater.description: Condition an early FEV culture inside a flatworm-derived host, yielding a colony-tamed floater specimen.
LanguageData.WestTek_MakeFloater.label: make floater
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerIsolatedFEVDosage.desc: Inject an isolated Forced Evolutionary Virus dose into a colonist. Vault-bred and baseline human subjects tend toward first-generation outcomes. Other xenotypes generally produce second-generation results.
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerIsolatedFEVDosage.jobS: Administering isolated FEV dosage to TargetA.
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerRefinedFEVDosage.descr: Inject a refined Forced Evolutionary Virus dose into a colonist or colony prisoner. Outcomes split between centaur conversion and super mutant conversion.
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerRefinedFEVDosage.jobSt: Administering refined FEV dosage to TargetA.
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerRefinedFEVDosage.label: administer refined FEV dosage
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerUnrefinedFEVDosage.des: Inject an unstable Forced Evolutionary Virus dose into a colony prisoner. The virus is not controlled enough to produce consistent results — outcomes split between centaur conversion, super mutant conversion, and fatal tissue breakdown.
LanguageData.WestTek_AdministerUnrefinedFEVDosage.job: Administering unrefined FEV dosage to TargetA.
LanguageData.CureAbasia.label: motor cortex reset
LanguageData.CureAbasia.description: A precision neurosurgical intervention targeting the motor cortex dysfunction caused by shell shock. The procedure uses direct cortical stimulation to break the psychosomatic feedback loop that trauma has locked in place, forcing the motor pathways to reinitialise. The patient regains the ability to walk immediately. The surgery is technically demanding and consumes large quantities of ultratech medicine.
LanguageData.CureAbasia.successfullyRemovedHediffMess: {0} has successfully reset {1}'s motor cortex, curing their shell shock.
